message:
test(conformance): add process_ops and socket_ops conformance test harnesses

Adds fixture validation tests for:
- process_ops: fork, waitpid, getpid, getppid coverage (10 tests)
- socket_ops: socket, bind, listen, shutdown, TCP/UDP coverage (12 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
